case.title: User is able to enter ‘Candidates’ page after clicking ‘Candidates’ link on top menu

custom.steps:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Click "Candidates" link on main menu.

3. Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to "Candidates" page.

case.title: User is able to enter "Jobs" page after clicking "Jobs" link on top menu

custom.steps:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Click "Jobs" link on main menu.

3. Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to "Jobs" page.

case.title: User is able to enter "Sign In" page after clicking "Sign In" link on top menu

custom.steps:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Click "Sign in" link on main menu.

3. Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to "Sign in" page

case.title: User is able to toggle beetwen [For companies] state and [For engineers] state when clicking toggle switch link on top menu

custom.steps:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Click "For engineers" toggle switch on main menu.

3. Observe result

4. Click "For companies" toggle switch on main menu.

5. Observe result
custom.expected: User can toggle between "For engineers" and "For companies" states on navbar on top of the page

case.title: User is able to enter "Sign Up" page after clicking "Sign Up" link on top menu

custom.steps:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Click "Sign up" link on main menu.

3. Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to "Sign up" page

case.title: Logged in User is able to enter "Chats" page after clicking "Chats" link on top menu

custom.preconds: User is registered and logged in
custom.steps:
1 Click "Chats" link on main menu.

2. Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to "Chats" page

case.title: Logged In User can open [Profile] Tab after clicking "Profile" link on top menu

custom.preconds: User is registered and logged in
custom.steps:
1. Click "Profile" link on main menu.

2. Observe result
custom.expected: "Profile" tab is shown to the user

case.title: User is able to see other companies proposition when scroling down to comparision section on the page

custom.steps:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Toggle [For companies] switch on navbar

3. Scroll down to comparision section

4. Observe result
custom.expected: User sees other companies proposition when scroling down to comparision section on the page

case.title: User is able to see at least 2 other companies proposition when scroling down to comparision section on the page

custom.preconds:
1. Go to page https://huntd.tech/

2. Toggle [For companies] switch on navbar

3. Scroll down to comparision section

3. Observe result
custom.expected: User sees at least 2 other companies proposition when scroling down to comparision section on the page

case.title: User is able to see quotes from CEO when scroling down to quotes section on the page

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2. Toggle [For companies] switch on navbar

3 Scroll down to quotes section
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees CEO quotes when scroling down to quotes section on the page

case.title: User is able to see partners logos from CEO when scroling down to partners section on the page

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2. Toggle [For companies] switch on navbar

3 Scroll down to partners section
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees partners logos when scroling down to partners section on the page

case.title: User is redirected to "Candidates"page when clicking [Hire Engineers] button on the body section.

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2. Toggle [For companies] switch on navbar

3 Click on [Hire Engineers] button
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees CEO quotes when scroling down to quotes section on the page

case.title: User is able to open Google authorization process when clicking [Google logo] in registration section.

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2 Click on [Google logo] button on registration section
3 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees opened Google OAuth window when clicking [Google logo] in registration section.

case.title: User is able to open LinkedIn authorization process when clicking [LinkedIn logo] in registration section

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2 Click on [LinkedIn logo] button in registration section
3 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees opened LinkedIn OAuth window when clicking [LinkedIn logo] in registration section

case.title: User is able to open GitHub authorization process when clicking [GitHub logo] in registration section

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2 Click on [GitHub logo] button in registration section
3 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees opened GitHub OAuth window when clicking [GitHub logo] in registration section

case.title: User is redirected to Sign Up page after submitting valid email via Get offers button

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2 Enter valid email into {Email} field in registration section
3 Click on [Get offers] button
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to Sign Up page after submitting valid email via Get offers button

case.title: User is redirected to Job page when clicking [Apply} button on any job from job cards

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to latest job offers section
3 Click [Apply] button on any job from the group of job cards 
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to Job page when clicking Apply button on job cards

case.title: Signed-in user sees mobile app banner instead of sign-up form

custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/ with a valid user account
2 Observe result
custom.expected: Signed-in user sees a banner with mobile app advertisement on a main page.

case.title: Bottom of the page contains at least 10 feedbacks from real users

custom.steps:
1 Go to page https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the carousel section with users feedback
3 Navigate corusel with arrows and count visible entries
custom.expected: User sees at least 10 feedbacks from real users at the bottom of the page

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by role in filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page
2. Select any role from Role input list
3. Check filtered result on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with selected role.

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by technologies in filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page
2. Select any technology from Technologies input list
3. Check filtered result on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with selected technologies.

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by annual salary in filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Toggle salary switch to Annual position

3. Select salary range using min and max sliders.

4. Check filtered result on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with selected annual salary range.

case.title: Registered user is able to refine filtration range when using salary filtration

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Toggle salary switch to Annual position

3. Select salary range using min and max sliders.

4. Check filtered result on the list

5. Change salary range using min and max sliders.

6. Observe result
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with modified selected annual salary range.

case.title: Registered user is able to refine filtration range when using location filtration

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Toggle location switch to Timezone position

3. Select timezone range using min and max sliders.

4. Check filtered result on the list

5. Change timezone range using min and max sliders.

6. Observe result
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with modified selected timezone range.

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by monthly salary in filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Toggle salary switch to Monthly position

3. Select salary range using min and max sliders.

4. Check filtered result on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with selected monthly salary range.

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by english level in filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page
2. Select any level from English level input list
3. Check filtered result on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with selected english level.

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by Timezone in location filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Toggle "Timezone" on location switch

3. Select Timezone range using left and right sliders

4. Check filteredresult on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates with selected Timezone range.

case.title: Registered user is able to filter Candidates list by country in location filters section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Toggle "Country/City" on location switch

3. Type in any country or city name in input field

4. Check filtered result on the list
custom.expected: Registered user see list contains only candidates from selected location.

case.title: Registered user is able to save filtration settings when using filtration section

custom.preconds: User is logged in as a recruiter.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Choose at lest one feature in filtering options.

3. Click [Save filters & subscribe] button

4. Go to your Profile/Hiring management page

5. Check cards in Subsriptions tab
custom.expected: Registered user sees card with set filtrering options.

case.title: Registered user is able to clear filtration settings when using filtration section

custom.preconds: User is logged in.
custom.steps:
1. Open candidates page

2. Choose at lest one feature in filtering options.

3. Click [Clear filters] button

4. Observe result
custom.expected: Registered user sees all filters set to default.

case.title: Not logged user is able to open sign in page when hovering over the Filters section and clicking [Sign In] button

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/ without signing in
2 Hover over the Filters section

3. Click [Sign In] button
4 Observe result
custom.expected: Not logged user is redirected to sign in page when hovering over the Filters section and clicking Sign In button.

case.title: Not logged user is able to open sign up page when hovering over the Filters section and clicking [Sign Up] button

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/ without signing in

2 Hover over the Filters section

3. Click [Sign up] button

4 Observe result
custom.expected: Not logged user is redirected to sign up page when hovering over the Filters section and clicking Sign Up button.

case.title: Filters section contains field: Role

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to the Filters section
3 Observe available fields
custom.expected: Filters section contains field: Role

case.title: Filters section contains field: Technologies

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to the Filters section
3 Observe available fields
custom.expected: Filters section contains field: Technologies

case.title: Filters section contains field: Desired base salary

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to the Filters section
3 Observe available fields
custom.expected: Filters section contains field: Desired base salary

case.title: Filters section contains field: English level

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to the Filters section
3 Observe available fields
custom.expected: Filters section contains field: English level

case.title: Filters section contains field: Candidate's location

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to the Filters section
3 Observe available fields
custom.expected: Filters section contains field: Candidate's location

case.title: Candidate card contains a list of skills

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Go to Candidates page
3 Observe content of any candidate card
custom.expected: Candidate card contains a list of skills.

case.title: Candidate card contains short description of achievements

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Go to Candidates page
3 Observe content of any candidate card
custom.expected: Candidate card contains short description of achievements.

case.title: Clicking Show experience opens all candidate experiences

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Go to "Candidates" page and Scroll to candidate cards
3 Click on “Show experience”
4 Observe result
custom.expected: All candidate’s experiences become visible after clicking “Show experience”

case.title: Recruiter can start chat with a candidate by clicking [Start chat] button

custom.preconds: User is logged in as a Recruiter
custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/

2 Go to "Candidates" page and Scroll to candidate cards

3 Click on [Start chat] button

4 Observe result
custom.expected: "Send message" aplet is opened after reqruiter clicks [Start chat] on candidates card.

case.title: Candidate must have recruiter profile to chat with candidates

custom.preconds: User is logged in as a candidate
custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/

2 Go to "Candidates" page and Scroll to candidate cards

3 Click on [Start chat] button

4 Observe result
custom.expected: "Create reqruit profile" applet is open when user-candidate clicks [start chat] button

case.title: Candidate profile opens in new tab after clicking candidate card

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to candidate cards
3 Click on any candidate card
4 Observe result
custom.expected: Candidate profile opens in a new browser tab

case.title: Candidate contact information is hidden by default

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Open any candidate card
3 Observe contact information section
custom.expected: Candidate contact information is hidden by default

case.title: Candidates contacts are hidden for recruiter before chat is started

custom.preconds:
Recruiter is logged in

candidate exists

no chat between them
custom.steps:
1. Go to candidate list on Candidates page.
  2. Click a candidate card to open the profile.
  3. Observe result
custom.expected: Contacts info is blurred and massage "CV and contacts are hidden. To make them visible, send a message to the candidate" is shown

case.title: Contacts remain hidden if recruiter starts chat but candidate did not share contact info

custom.preconds:
Recruiter is logged in

exist chat between them

candidate did not click [Share contact info}
custom.steps:
1. Go to chats page.
  2. Recruiter opens candidate profile.
  3. Observe result
custom.expected: Contacts info is blurred and massage "CV and contacts are hidden. To make them visible, send a message to the candidate" is shown

case.title: Candidate contacts are vissible after recruiter starts chat and candidate accepts share contact info

custom.preconds:
Recruiter is logged in

exist chat between them

candidate clicked [Share contact info}
custom.steps:
1. Go to chats page.
  2. Recruiter opens candidate profile.
  3. Observe result
custom.expected: Contacts info is shown for the recruiter

case.title: Candidate experience is sorted from oldest to newest

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Open any candidate card
3 Scroll to experience section
4 Observe order of positions
custom.expected: Candidate’s experience is sorted from oldest to newest positions

case.title: User can register as recruiter or candidate after entering email and password on Sign Up page

custom.steps:
1. Click Sign Up button on navbar
  2. Enter valid email and password
  3. Choose Recruiter or Candidate option
  4. Observe result
custom.expected: User can proceed with registration as recruiter or candidate after entering valid email and password

case.title: User can register using Google authorization

custom.preconds: User has active google acoount
custom.steps:
1. Open the Sign up page from navbar.
  2. Click “Sign up with Google”.
  3. Select a valid Google account in the Google OAuth popup.
  4. Grant requested permissions.
custom.expected: User is redirected back to the platform and sees the dashboard page.

case.title: User can register using LinkedIn authorization

custom.preconds: User has active LinkedIn acoount
custom.steps:
1. Open the Sign up page from navbar.
  2. Click “Sign up with LinkedIn ”.
  3. Select a valid LinkedIn account in the Google OAuth popup.
  4. Grant requested permissions.
custom.expected: User is redirected back to the platform and sees the dashboard page.

case.title: User can register using GitHub authorization

custom.preconds: User has active GitHub acoount
custom.steps:
1. Open the Sign up page from navbar.
  2. Click “Sign up with GitHub ”.
  3. Select a valid GitHub account in the Google OAuth popup.
  4. Grant requested permissions.
custom.expected: User is redirected back to the platform and sees the dashboard page.

case.title: User is able to fill Position and Company fields during recruiter registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Enter valid Position
  2. Enter valid Company
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Contact Information step.

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Position and Company fields during recruiter registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Leave Position field empty
  2. Leave Company field empty
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Error information "Field can not be empty" are shown to the user.

case.title: User is able to fill First name and Last name fields during recruiter registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Enter valid First name
  2. Enter valid Last name
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Candidates filtration step.

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Contact fields during recruiter registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Leave First name field empty
  2. Leave Last name field empty
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Error information "Field is required" are shown to the user.

case.title: Recruiter is able to select candidate role during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Select at least one candidate role on "Find your first engineers" section
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: Role is selected and recruiter is redirected to "Reach out to matching engineers" step

case.title: Recruiter is able to select required technologies during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Select at least one required technologies  on "Find your first engineers" section
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: Required technologies is selected and recruiter is redirected to "Reach out to matching engineers" step

case.title: Recruiter is able to select salary range during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Select salary range on "Find your first engineers" section
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: Salary range is selected and recruiter is redirected to "Reach out to matching engineers" step

case.title: Recruiter is able to select years of experience during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Select years of experience on "Find your first engineers" section
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: Years of experience are selected and recruiter is redirected to "Reach out to matching engineers" step

case.title: Recruiter is able to select candidate english level during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Select english level on "Find your first engineers" section
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: English level is selected and recruiter is redirected to "Reach out to matching engineers" step

case.title: Recruiter is able to select candidate location during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Select location on "Find your first engineers" section
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: Location is selected and recruiter is redirected to "Reach out to matching engineers" step

case.title: Recruiter is not able to proceed when none of filtres is selected

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Leave all filtring fields untouched
  2. Click "Next" button
custom.expected: Next button is inactive.

case.title: User is redirected to filtered candidates list after completing recruiter registration

custom.preconds: User is on a page https://huntd.tech/
custom.steps:
1. Click "Sign Up" Button
  2. Fill al required info and choose Sign Up as a recruiter
  3. Complete all registration steps with valid informations.
  4. Choose manually Sending message step.
custom.expected: User is redirected to Candidates page with applied filters.

case.title: Recruiter is able to automatically send message to filtered engineers

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Type in message in message field on "Reach out to matching engineers" page
  2. Click [Send] button
custom.expected: Message is sent and user proceeds to candidate list.

case.title: Recruiter is able to skip sending messages during registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a recruiter on "Reach out to matching engineers" step
custom.steps:
Leave empty message field on "Reach out to matching engineers" page 

Click [Contact Engineers manualy] button
custom.expected: User proceeds to candidates list without sending messages.

case.title: User is able to fill all fields in Role tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Fill in "Desired Position" field
  2. Choose at least one "Desired Role"
  3. Choose at least five "Technical Skills"
  4. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Candidates expectations step.

case.title: User is able to fill all fields in Expectations tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a candidate in a Expectations Tab
custom.steps:
1. Fill in "Salary" field
  2. Choose "Job experience"
  3. Choose "English level"
  4. Choose "Location"
  5. Select Employment options
  6. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Candidates experience step.

case.title: User is able to fill all fields in Experience tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Fill in "Role" field
  2. Fill in "Company" field
  3. Choose start and end dates
  4. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Candidates expectations step.

case.title: User is able to fill all fields in Bio tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Fill in "Achievements" field
  2. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Candidates expectations step.

case.title: User is able to fill all fields in Contact tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is in a process of Signing Up as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Fill in "First Name " field
  2. Fill in "last Name " field
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Candidates expectations step.

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Desired position field on Role Tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Role tab
custom.steps:
1. Leave Desired position empty 
  2. Fill other fields
  3. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed; user stays on Role tab

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Desired roles field on Role Tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Role tab
custom.steps:
1. Fill all fields except Desired roles 
  2.  Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when chooseng fewer than 5 skills on Role Tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Role tab
custom.steps:
1. Fill all fields 
  2. Select fewer than 5 skills 
  3. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Salary field on Expectations Tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Expectations tab
custom.steps:
1. Toggle salary type 
  2. Leave salary empty 
  3. Fill other fields 
  4. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when selecting Office tick but leaving empty office location field on Expectations Tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Expectations tab
custom.steps:
1. Select Office 
  2. Leave office location empty 
  3. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Job experience field on Experience Tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Expectations tab
custom.steps:
1. Fill all fields except job experience 
  2. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User is able to fill all fields when adding manually experience in Experience tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Experience tab
custom.steps:
1. Click Add manually 
  2. Enter Role 
  3. Enter Company name 
  4. Select Start date 
  5. Toggle I'm working there OR enter End date 
  6. Enter Achievements 
  7. Click Save
custom.expected: Summary card displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Role field when manualy addding Experience during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Add manually form
custom.steps:
1. Leave Role empty 
  2. Fill other fields 
  3. Click Save
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when toggle off end date but leaving empty End date field when manualy addding Experience during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Add manually form
custom.steps:
1. Turn off I'm working there toggle  
  2. Leave End date empty 
  3. Click Save
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Achievements field on BioTab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Bio tab
custom.steps:
1. Leave Achievements empty 
  2. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User is able to upload photo on contacts tab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Contact tab
custom.steps:
1. Toggle avatar to Usual 
  2. Upload photo
custom.expected: Photo uploaded successfully

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty First name field on ContactsTab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Contact tab
custom.steps:
1. Leave First name empty 
  2. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: User sees validation errors when leaving empty Last name field on ContactsTab during candidate registration

custom.preconds: User is on Contact tab
custom.steps:
1. Leave Last name empty 
  2. Click Save and continue
custom.expected: Validation error displayed

case.title: Sign In page contains Forgot password link redirecting to Forgot password page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/sign-in
2 Locate “Forgot the password” link
3 Click on the link
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User is redirected to Forgot password page after clicking “Forgot the password” link

case.title: User can Sign In after entering email and password on Sign In page

custom.steps:
1. Click Sign Up button on navbar
  2. Enter valid email and password
  3. Observe result
custom.expected: User is logged in after entering valid email and password

case.title: User can Sign In using Google authorization

custom.preconds: User has active google acoount
custom.steps:
1. Open the Sign In page from navbar.
  2. Click “Sign inwith Google”.
  3. Select a valid Google account in the Google OAuth popup.
  4. Grant requested permissions.
custom.expected: User is redirected back to the platform and sees the dashboard page.

case.title: User can Sign In using LinkedIn authorization

custom.preconds: User has active LinkedIn acoount
custom.steps:
1. Open the Sign in page from navbar.
  2. Click “Sign in with LinkedIn ”.
  3. Select a valid LinkedIn account in the Google OAuth popup.
  4. Grant requested permissions.
custom.expected: User is redirected back to the platform and sees the dashboard page.

case.title: User can Sign In using GitHub authorization

custom.preconds: User has active GitHub acoount
custom.steps:
1. Open the Sign in page from navbar.
  2. Click “Sign in with GitHub ”.
  3. Select a valid GitHub account in the Google OAuth popup.
  4. Grant requested permissions.
custom.expected: User is redirected back to the platform and sees the dashboard page.

case.title: Registered users recieves confirmation after posting a new job manually on jobs page

custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/ as a registered user
2 Navigate to job posting section
3 Choose Post Job manualy
4 Fill in or upload required job details
5 Submit the job
6 Observe result
custom.expected: Registered users sees pop up window with message "New request was sent"

case.title: Applying with 1 click is available for user logged in as a Candidate

custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/ as a candidate
2 Navigate to any job listing
3 Click on [Apply with 1 click]
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees confirmation of applied job.

case.title: Users can filter vacancies using skills filters

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to vacancies section
3 Use skills filters to refine results
4 Observe result
custom.expected: Vacancy results are filtered according to selected skills

case.title: Not logged-in users can only view limited vacancies and are prompted to sign in when clicking View more

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/ without signing in
2 Navigate to vacancies section
3 Click on [View more]
4 Observe result
custom.expected: Not logged-in users see limited vacancies and are prompted to sign in after clicking [View more]

case.title: Users recieves confirmation after filling all fields in subbscribe to vacancies list form at the bottom of the page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the bottom of the page
3 Fill in Desired roles, Experience, and Email fields
4 Click on [Recieve Jobs]
5 Observe result
custom.expected: User receives confirmation of successful subscription

case.title: Users recieves error validation after all fields empty in subbscribe to vacancies list form at the bottom of the page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the bottom of the page
3 Leave Desired roles, Experience, and Email fields empty
4 Click on [Recieve Jobs]
5 Observe result
custom.expected: User receives error monit.

case.title: Logged-in users can view additional vacancies when clicking View more button on jobs ist page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/ without signing in
2 Navigate to vacancies section
3 Click on [View more]
4 Observe result
custom.expected: List of vacancies expands when logged-in users clicks [View more]

case.title: Applying with 1 click is not available for user logged in as a Reqruiter

custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/ as a candidate
2 Navigate to any job listing
3 Click on [Apply with 1 click]
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User sees monit "Create a candidate" profile

case.title: Recruiter can initiate chat with a candidate from the list of candidates

custom.steps:
1. Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Navigate to the list of candidates
  3. Click on [Start chat] button on any candidate card
  4. Type in message in message window
  5. Click {Send message] button
  6. Go to chats page
  7. Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter is able to see new conversation on his chats list

case.title: Recruiter can initiate chat with a candidate from candidate profile page

custom.steps:
1. Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Navigate to the list of candidates
  3. Open any of candidates profile page
  4. Click on [Start chat] button on any candidate card
  5. Type in message in message window
  6. Click {Send message] button
  7. Go to chats page
  8. Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter is able to see new conversation on his chats list

case.title: Recruiter cannot see candidate contacts before initiating chat

custom.steps:
1 Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
2 Open any candidate profile
3 Observe contact information section before starting chat
custom.expected: Recruiter cannot see candidate contact information before initiating chat

case.title: Candidate can share contacts info to recruiter after recievieng message from recruiter

custom.steps:
1. Sign in as candidate on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Open chat request from recruiter
  3. Click Share [contacts] button
  4. Click [Confirm] on confimation popup window
  5. Observe result
custom.expected: Candidate see his contact informations popped out in chat conversation window

case.title: Recruiter can send offer to active candidate

custom.preconds: There is an active chat beetween recruiter and candidate.
custom.steps:
1 Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
2 Open an active chat with a candidate
3 Type in offer message and send to candidate
4 Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter can see his message popped up in chat window.

case.title: User can archive chat from chat list

custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to chat list
3 Select any chat
4 Click on [Archive] option from chat kebeb menu
5 Observe result
custom.expected: User can see chat on a list of archived chats

case.title: User can unarchive chat from archived chat list

custom.preconds: There is an active chat beetween recruiter and candidate.
custom.steps:
1. Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Go to the list of an archived chats 
  3. Click kebab menu on one chat from the list
  4. Choose "unarchive"
  5. Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter can see chat back on the list of active chats

case.title: Recruiter can mark chat as rejected

custom.preconds: There is an active chat beetween recruiter and candidate.
custom.steps:
1. Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Go to the list of an active chats 
  3. Click kebab menu on one chat from the list
  4. Choose "rejected"
  5. Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter can see chat on the list marked as rejected

case.title: Recruiter can mark chat as favourite

custom.preconds: There is an active chat beetween recruiter and candidate.
custom.steps:
1. Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Go to the list of an active chats 
  3. Click kebab menu on one chat from the list
  4. Choose "favourite"
  5. Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter can see chat on the list marked as favourite

case.title: Recruiter can delete chat from chat list

custom.preconds: There is an active chat beetween recruiter and candidate.
custom.steps:
1. Sign in as recruiter on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Go to the list of an active chats 
  3. Click kebab menu on one chat from the list
  4. Choose "delete"
  5. Observe result
custom.expected: Recruiter can see chat is deleted from the list

case.title: Candidate can response and share contacts info to recruiter after recievieng message from recruiter

custom.steps:
1. Sign in as candidate on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Open chat request from recruiter
  3. Click [Interested] button and send pasted response
  4. Click Share [contacts] button in popup window
  5. Click [Confirm] on confimation popup window
  6. Observe result
custom.expected: Candidate see his senden message and contact informations popped out in chat conversation window

case.title: Candidate can response and not share contacts info to recruiter after recievieng message from recruiter

custom.steps:
1. Sign in as candidate on https://huntd.tech/
  2. Open chat request from recruiter
  3. Click [Interested] button and send pasted response
  4. Observe result
custom.expected: Candidate see his response message popped out in chat conversation window

case.title: User can post a job on a Jobs page and Apply with 1-click without having to log in to another account

custom.preconds: User is logged in as a recruiter and as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Navigate to Jobs page
  3. Click [Post a Job] button and observe result
  4. Click [Apply with 1 click] button on any job offer
  5. Observe result
custom.expected: User sees that the Post a job process has started and receives a confirmation that the job was applied successfully.

case.title: User can add candidate profile after being logged in as a recruiter

custom.preconds: User has active recruiter account.
custom.steps:
1 log in as a recruiter  on https://huntd.tech/
2 Go to your profile page
4 Observe result
custom.expected: User is able to create candidate profile after registration

case.title: User can switch from recruiter to candidate profile in profile settings

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to profile settings
3 Switch to candidate profile
4 Observe result
custom.expected: 1. User sees changed list of options in profile tab

case.title: User can connect social networks in profile settings

custom.preconds: User has candidate or recruiter account
custom.steps:
1. Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Navigate to profile settings
  3. Type in LinkedIn, GitHub, and Google links to apropriate fields.
  4. Go to Preview profile profile
  5. Click listed links to social media
  6. Observe result
custom.expected: User can see all social connected links and is able to click them and is redirected to apropriate pages

case.title: User can deactivate candidate profile in profile settings

custom.preconds: User has active candidate profile
custom.steps:
1. Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Navigate to profile settings
  3. Click deactivate button
  4. Observe result
custom.expected: User is able to deactivate their candidate profile in profile settings

case.title: User can activate candidate profile in profile settings

custom.preconds: User has deactivated candidate profile
custom.steps:
1. Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Navigate to profile settings
  3. Click activate button
  4. Observe result
custom.expected: User is able to activate their candidate profile in profile settings

case.title: User can switch from candidate to recruiter profile in profile settings

custom.preconds: 1. User is Signed In as a candidate
custom.steps:
1 Sign in to https://huntd.tech/
2 Navigate to profile settings
3 Switch to recruiter profile
4 Observe result
custom.expected: 1. User sees changed list of options in profile tab

case.title: User can add recruiter profile after being logged in as a candidate

custom.preconds: User has active candidate account.
custom.steps:
1 log in as a candidate on https://huntd.tech/
2 Go to your profile page
4 Observe result
custom.expected: 1. User is able to create recruiter profile after registration

case.title: User is able to change Role and Company fields during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Enter new valid Position
  2. Enter new valid Company
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and user is redirected to Contact Information page.

case.title: User sees confirmation after changing Role and Company fields while editing recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Insert new valid data to Position field
  2. Insert new valid data to Company field
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Confirmation message is shown to the user.

case.title: User is able to add photo during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Go to your profile contact tab informations
  2. Click "upload photo"and choose a file
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Photo is succesfully uploaded and visible.

case.title: User is able to remove photo during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter and has uploaded photo on his profile
custom.steps:
1. Go to your profile contact tab informations
  2. Click "Remove photo file"
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Photo is succesfully removed and not visible.

case.title: User is able to add cv file during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Go to your profile contact tab informations
  2. Click "Attach CV file "and choose a file
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: File is succesfully uploaded and visible.

case.title: User is able to remove CV during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter and has uploaded CV on his profile
custom.steps:
1. Go to your profile contact tab informations
  2. Click "Remove CV file"
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: CV is succesfully removed and not visible.

case.title: User is able to change First Name and Last Name fields during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Change First Name input
  2. Change Last Name input
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and change is visible on Contact Information page.

case.title: User is able to edit LinkedIn page link during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Paste new LinkedIn profile link
  2. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and new adress is visible

case.title: User is able to edit Behance page link during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Paste new Behance profile link
  2. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and new adress is visible

case.title: User is able to edit GitHub page link during edition of recruiter profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a recruiter
custom.steps:
1. Paste new GitHub profile link
  2. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and new adress is visible

case.title: User is able to edit all fields in Role tab during edition candidate profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Change in "Desired Position" field
  2. Change at least one "Desired Role"
  3. Change at least one "Technical Skills"
  4. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and change is visible.

case.title: User is able to edit all fields in Expectations tab during edition candidate profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Change in "Salary" field
  2. Change "Job experience"
  3. Change "English level"
  4. Change "Location"
  5. CHange Employment options
  6. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and visible.

case.title: User is able to edit all fields in Experience tab during edition candidate profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Go to Experience atb
  2. Click edit button in one of your jobs
  3. Change at least one input in every field
  4. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and change is visible.

case.title: User is able to edit all fields in Bio tab during edition candidate profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Change in "Achievements" field
  2. Change in "Expectations" field
  3. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and change is visible.

case.title: User is able to edit all fields in Contact tab during edition candidate profile

custom.preconds: User is Signed In as a candidate
custom.steps:
1. Change in "First name" field
  2. Change in "Last name" field
  3. Remove photo
  4. Change all links to social profiles
  5. Click 'Save and continue'.
custom.expected: Data is saved and change is visible

case.title: Footer contains TOP 100 WEB3 COMPANIES with preview of top 5 companies

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe the TOP 100 WEB3 COMPANIES block
4 Observe preview of top 5 companies
custom.expected: Footer displays “TOP 100 WEB3 COMPANIES” and shows preview of top 5 companies

case.title: Footer contains 3 columns of vacancies for web3 developers

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe vacancies section
custom.expected: Footer contains 3 columns of vacancies for web3 developers

case.title: Footer contains link to LinkedIn page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe social network links
custom.expected: Footer contains links to LinkedIn

case.title: Footer contains links to documents (terms of use, cookies and pirviacy policy)

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/

2 Scroll to the footer section

3 Observe links section
custom.expected: Fotter contains links to documents (terms of use, cookies and pirviacy policy)

case.title: Footer contains links to Pricing page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/

2 Scroll to the footer section

3 Observe links section
custom.expected: Footer contains links to pricing page

case.title: Footer contains links to FAQ page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/

2 Scroll to the footer section

3 Observe links section
custom.expected: 1. Footer contains links to FAQ page

case.title: Footer contains links to About Us page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/

2 Scroll to the footer section

3 Observe links section
custom.expected: Footer contains links to About Us page

case.title: Footer contains link to Twitter page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe social network links
custom.expected: 1. Footer contains links to twitter

case.title: Footer contains link to Telegram page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe social network links
custom.expected: 1. Footer contains links to Telegram

case.title: Footer contains link to Signal page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe social network links
custom.expected: 1. Footer contains links to Sigmal

case.title: Footer contains link to Instagram page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe social network links
custom.expected: 1. Footer contains links to instagram

case.title: Footer contains link to facebook page

custom.steps:
1 Go to https://huntd.tech/
2 Scroll to the footer section
3 Observe social network links
custom.expected: 1. Footer contains links to Facebook

case.title: Page contains table with 100 web3 companies split by 10

custom.steps:
1. Go to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Scroll to the companies table section
  3. Click [View Top 100] button
  4. Observe table structure
custom.expected: Page contains a table with 100 web3 companies split into groups of 10 (10/100; N/100; 100/100)

case.title: Each company has a clickable logo and name

custom.steps:
1. Go to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Scroll to the companies table section
  3. Click [View Top 100] button
  4. Observe table structure
custom.expected: Each company on the list has its logo and clickable link.

case.title: Clicking company logo opens vacancies page in new tab

custom.steps:
1. Go to https://huntd.tech/
  2. Scroll to the companies table section
  3. Click [View Top 100] button
  4. Observe table structure
  5. Click on any company logo or name
custom.expected: Company logo opens a new tab with a list of vacancies for that company
